item.title: 基础模型提供商
item.summary: 以基础模型能力为核心供给的产业范式。

updates.event: 公开信要求政策制定者区分合法的模型蒸馏技术与非法从闭源模型攫取价值的行为，反对一刀切限制。
updates.after: "Policymakers should distinguish legitimate model distillation from illegal value extraction from closed models, and avoid blanket restrictions."

evidence.source_quote: 政策制定者应谨慎区分合法的模型开发技术与不当挪用行为。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 政策制定者应谨慎区分合法的模型开发技术与不当挪用行为。

updates.event: 同主题更新：公开信呼吁政策制定者扩大初创企业和研究人员的算力获取渠道，并投资共享训练资产（数据集、工具、评估框架）。；公开信呼吁美国政策制定者扶持开源 AI 发展，保障算力与公共研发资源供给，避免过度管制压制创新。
updates.after: "Policy ask: expand compute access for startups and researchers and invest in shared training assets such as datasets, tools, and evaluation frameworks."

evidence.source_quote: 扩大初创企业和研究人员的算力获取渠道；投资共享训练资产（数据集、工具、评估框架）

evidence_cards.source_quote: 开源权重不仅在模型开发者之间创造竞争，也在云端芯片、应用和服务层面形成竞争。
扩大初创企业和研究人员的算力获取渠道；投资共享训练资产（数据集、工具、评估框架）
文章呼吁政策制定者扶持开源 AI 发展，保障算力与公共研发资源供给，避免过度管制压制创新。

updates.event: 公开信主张开源权重让组织无需从零训练模型或为每项任务支付前沿模型费用，即可基于先进模型开发。
updates.after: "Open weights let organizations build on advanced models without training from scratch or paying frontier-model fees for every task."

evidence.source_quote: 初创企业、成熟企业、大学及公共机构无需从零训练模型，也不必为每项任务支付前沿模型的费用，即可基于先进模型进行开发。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 初创企业、成熟企业、大学及公共机构无需从零训练模型，也不必为每项任务支付前沿模型的费用，即可基于先进模型进行开发。

updates.event: 公开信承认开放权重存在真实且独特的风险：权重一经发布便脱离原始开发者控制，修改后的版本也难以追踪或撤回。
updates.after: "Weights, once released, escape the original developer's control and modified versions are hard to track or retract."

evidence.source_quote: 权重一经发布，便脱离原始开发者的控制，修改后的版本也难以追踪或撤回。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 权重一经发布，便脱离原始开发者的控制，修改后的版本也难以追踪或撤回。

updates.event: 公开信定义开放权重模型为任何人都可下载、检视、修改并在自有基础设施上运行的 AI 模型。
updates.after: "Open-weight models are defined as AI models that anyone can download, inspect, modify, and run on their own infrastructure."

evidence.source_quote: 开源权重模型 —— 任何人都可下载、检视、修改并在自有基础设施上运行的 AI 模型

evidence_cards.source_quote: 开源权重模型 —— 任何人都可下载、检视、修改并在自有基础设施上运行的 AI 模型

updates.event: 微软、英伟达、IBM、Meta 等 25 家美国科技公司联名签署公开信，呼吁开放权重 AI 模型。

evidence.source_quote: 微软、英伟达、IBM、Meta 等 25 家美国科技公司联名签署公开信，呼吁开放权重 AI 模型。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 微软、英伟达、IBM、Meta 等 25 家美国科技公司联名签署公开信，呼吁开放权重 AI 模型。

updates.event: Five companies account for 23 of the 24 most frequently evaluated AI systems in EveryEvalEver, indicating a bias toward U.S. commercial models.

evidence.source_quote: The data also showed a bias toward U.S. commercial models, with five companies accounting for 23 of the 24 most frequently evaluated AI systems.

evidence_cards.source_quote: The data also showed a bias toward U.S. commercial models, with five companies accounting for 23 of the 24 most frequently evaluated AI systems.

updates.event: Across EveryEvalEver data, model providers identified the serving platform only 2% of the time and disclosed temperature (generation setting) less than 25% of the time.

evidence.source_quote: Model providers identified which platform was used to serve their model just 2% of the time and disclosed important generation settings like ‘temperature,’ which is the randomness of an LLM’s outputs, less than 25% of the time.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Model providers identified which platform was used to serve their model just 2% of the time and disclosed important generation settings like ‘temperature,’ which is the randomness of an LLM’s outputs, less than 25% of the time.

updates.event: GLM-5.2 提供 1M 无损上下文，支撑长程任务

evidence.source_quote: Solid 1M 上下文：稳定支撑长程任务

evidence_cards.source_quote: Solid 1M 上下文：稳定支撑长程任务

updates.event: 在主流编程基准上，GLM-5.2 与 Claude Opus 4.8 处于可比区间

evidence.source_quote: 在主流编程基准上，GLM-5.2 保持开源 SOTA，与 Claude Opus 4.8 处于可比区间

evidence_cards.source_quote: 在主流编程基准上，GLM-5.2 保持开源 SOTA，与 Claude Opus 4.8 处于可比区间

trends.summary: 尚无经审核的趋势判断
trends.label: 90天

trends.summary: 尚无经审核的趋势判断
trends.label: 12个月

trends.summary: 尚无经审核的趋势判断
trends.label: 3年

facts.subject: policy_ask_open_weight_ai
facts.statement: 公开信呼吁美国政策制定者扶持开源 AI 发展，保障算力与公共研发资源供给，避免过度管制压制创新。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 文章呼吁政策制定者扶持开源 AI 发展，保障算力与公共研发资源供给，避免过度管制压制创新。

facts.subject: open_weight_model_definition
facts.statement: 公开信定义开放权重模型为任何人都可下载、检视、修改并在自有基础设施上运行的 AI 模型。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 开源权重模型 —— 任何人都可下载、检视、修改并在自有基础设施上运行的 AI 模型

facts.subject: open_weight_competition_view
facts.statement: 公开信认为开源权重能在模型开发者之间以及云端芯片、应用和服务层面形成竞争。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 开源权重不仅在模型开发者之间创造竞争，也在云端芯片、应用和服务层面形成竞争。

facts.subject: redundant_output_reduction_deepswe
facts.statement: Gemini 3.6 Flash在DeepSWE基准上冗余输出减少65%

evidence_cards.source_quote: DeepSWE基准上甚至砍掉了65%的冗余输出

facts.subject: output_token_reduction
facts.statement: Gemini 3.6 Flash相比3.5 Flash输出token量减少17%（按Artificial Analysis统计）

evidence_cards.source_quote: 相比3.5 Flash，输出token量减少了17%（按Artificial Analysis的统计）

facts.subject: glm_5_2_open_weight_license
facts.statement: Hugging Face选择GLM-5.2的原因之一是其采用开放权重和MIT许可证，可部署在企业自有基础设施中。

evidence_cards.source_quote: Hugging Face选择GLM-5.2，首先是因为它采用开放权重和MIT许可证，可以部署在企业自己的基础设施中

facts.subject: open_weight_economic_logic
facts.statement: 公开信主张开源权重让组织无需从零训练模型或为每项任务支付前沿模型费用，即可基于先进模型开发。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 初创企业、成熟企业、大学及公共机构无需从零训练模型，也不必为每项任务支付前沿模型的费用，即可基于先进模型进行开发。

facts.subject: flash_lite_input_token_price_usd_per_million
facts.statement: Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite is priced at $0.3 per million input tokens and $2.5 per million output tokens.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 定价为每百万输入 token 0.3 美元、每百万输出 token 2.5 美元

facts.subject: input_token_price_usd_per_million
facts.statement: Gemini 3.6 Flash is priced at $1.5 per million input tokens.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 定价为每百万输入 token 1.5 美元

facts.subject: output_token_price_usd_per_million
facts.statement: Gemini 3.6 Flash is priced at $7.5 per million output tokens.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 每百万输出 token 7.5 美元

facts.subject: benchmark_documentation_completeness
facts.statement: Across EveryEvalEver data, model providers identified the serving platform only 2% of the time and disclosed temperature (generation setting) less than 25% of the time.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Model providers identified which platform was used to serve their model just 2% of the time and disclosed important generation settings like ‘temperature,’ which is the randomness of an LLM’s outputs, less than 25% of the time.

facts.subject: model_parameters
facts.statement: Qwen3.8 has 2.4T parameters, according to the Alibaba Qwen team's announcement on July 19, 2026.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 该模型参数2.4T

facts.subject: glm_5_2_context_window
facts.statement: GLM-5.2 提供 1M 无损上下文，支撑长程任务

evidence_cards.source_quote: Solid 1M 上下文：稳定支撑长程任务

facts.subject: benchmark_ranking_flashinfer_bench
facts.statement: Qwen3.8 preview ranked first on the FlashInfer-Bench subset of NVIDIA's SOL-ExecBench, ahead of Tencent Hunyuan Hyra (rank 2), human developer Amir M. Mir (rank 4), doubleAI's automated GPU kernel generation agent (rank 6), and Cursor (rank 10).

evidence_cards.source_quote: 排名第二为腾讯混元Hyra，第四为人类开发者Amir M. Mir，第六为美国AI创企doubleAI的自动GPU内核生成智能体，第十为Cursor

facts.subject: eval_tool_call_iterations
facts.statement: On the FlashInfer-Bench evaluation, the model completed an average of 29,354 rounds of tool calls per problem, iterating through compile-execute-analyze loops.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 该模型完成了平均29354轮工具调用的持续迭代

facts.subject: deepswe_benchmark_score
facts.statement: Gemini 3.6 Flash scores 49% on the DeepSWE benchmark, up from 37% for 3.5 Flash, and on Datacurve's DeepSWE reduces token usage by up to 65%.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 在 DeepSWE 上达到 49%（3.5 Flash 为 37%）

facts.subject: built_in_model
facts.statement: MiMo Code V0.1.0 内置限时免费多模态模型 MiMo-V2.5

evidence_cards.source_quote: 它内置限时免费多模态模型 MiMo-V2.5

facts.subject: claude_opus_4_7_4_8_long_context_baseline
facts.statement: 智谱称多个长程任务基准表明 GLM-5.2 表现介于 Claude Opus 4.7 与 4.8 之间

evidence_cards.source_quote: 多个长程任务基准表明 GLM-5.2 的表现介于 Claude Opus 4.7 与 4.8 之间，是排名最高的开源模型

facts.subject: claude_opus_4_8_coding_benchmark
facts.statement: 在主流编程基准上，GLM-5.2 与 Claude Opus 4.8 处于可比区间

evidence_cards.source_quote: 在主流编程基准上，GLM-5.2 保持开源 SOTA，与 Claude Opus 4.8 处于可比区间

facts.subject: intelligence_index_ranking_context
facts.statement: Artificial Analysis榜单上Gemini 3.6 Flash Intelligence得分为50，落后于Claude Fable 5、GPT-5.6 Sol、Kimi K3、Grok 4.5、GLM-5.2及Meta的Muse Spark 1.1

evidence_cards.source_quote: 该模型的Intelligence得分只有50，落后于Claude Fable 5、GPT-5.6 Sol、Kimi K3、Grok 4.5、GLM-5.2，连Meta的Muse Spark 1.1也排在它前面

facts.subject: open_letter_signatory_count
facts.statement: 微软、英伟达、IBM、Meta 等 25 家美国科技公司联名签署公开信，呼吁开放权重 AI 模型。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 微软、英伟达、IBM、Meta 等 25 家美国科技公司联名签署公开信，呼吁开放权重 AI 模型。

facts.subject: open_weight_risk_statement
facts.statement: 公开信承认开放权重存在真实且独特的风险：权重一经发布便脱离原始开发者控制，修改后的版本也难以追踪或撤回。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 权重一经发布，便脱离原始开发者的控制，修改后的版本也难以追踪或撤回。

facts.subject: distillation_legitimacy_position
facts.statement: 公开信要求政策制定者区分合法的模型蒸馏技术与非法从闭源模型攫取价值的行为，反对一刀切限制。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 政策制定者应谨慎区分合法的模型开发技术与不当挪用行为。

facts.subject: compute_access_policy_ask
facts.statement: 公开信呼吁政策制定者扩大初创企业和研究人员的算力获取渠道，并投资共享训练资产（数据集、工具、评估框架）。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 扩大初创企业和研究人员的算力获取渠道；投资共享训练资产（数据集、工具、评估框架）

facts.subject: founding_lineage
facts.statement: Facewall Intelligence was incubated from the Tsinghua University Natural Language Processing laboratory.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 孵化自清华大学自然语言处理实验室

recentUpdates.after: "Weights, once released, escape the original developer's control and modified versions are hard to track or retract."

evidence.source_quote: 权重一经发布，便脱离原始开发者的控制，修改后的版本也难以追踪或撤回。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 权重一经发布，便脱离原始开发者的控制，修改后的版本也难以追踪或撤回。

recentUpdates.event: 公开信定义开放权重模型为任何人都可下载、检视、修改并在自有基础设施上运行的 AI 模型。
recentUpdates.after: "Open-weight models are defined as AI models that anyone can download, inspect, modify, and run on their own infrastructure."

evidence.source_quote: 开源权重模型 —— 任何人都可下载、检视、修改并在自有基础设施上运行的 AI 模型

recentUpdates.event: 微软、英伟达、IBM、Meta 等 25 家美国科技公司联名签署公开信，呼吁开放权重 AI 模型。

recentUpdates.event: Five companies account for 23 of the 24 most frequently evaluated AI systems in EveryEvalEver, indicating a bias toward U.S. commercial models.

evidence.source_quote: The data also showed a bias toward U.S. commercial models, with five companies accounting for 23 of the 24 most frequently evaluated AI systems.

evidence_cards.source_quote: The data also showed a bias toward U.S. commercial models, with five companies accounting for 23 of the 24 most frequently evaluated AI systems.

recentUpdates.event: Across EveryEvalEver data, model providers identified the serving platform only 2% of the time and disclosed temperature (generation setting) less than 25% of the time.

evidence.source_quote: Model providers identified which platform was used to serve their model just 2% of the time and disclosed important generation settings like ‘temperature,’ which is the randomness of an LLM’s outputs, less than 25% of the time.
